value: Store: internal/storage/dolt/store.go (DoltStore wraps *sql.DB). Config: internal/configfile/configfile.go (metadata.json) + internal/config/yaml_config.go (config.yaml). Main entry: cmd/bd/main.go with globals store, rootCtx, rootCancel. Backend is always Dolt (GetBackend() hardcodes dolt). Two modes: embedded (CGO) and server (MySQL protocol, multi-writer).

Follow .beads/formulas/beads-release.formula.toml for ALL releases. Version files to update: version.go, plugin.json, package.json, pyproject.toml, __init__.py, default.nix, 4 hook templates (cmd/bd/templates/hooks/), README badge. Release CI uses zig 0.14.0 for cross-compilation + -lresolv.9 workaround for macOS.

Test infra L1: Server reuse via BEADS_DOLT_PORT env var. L2: Branch-per-test for dolt, tracker, molecules, doctor packages. Server crash detection: TestDoltServer.IsCrashed()/CrashError() in testdoltserver.go. cmd/bd and cmd/bd/doctor stay on database-per-test (reopen stores from metadata.json).

User (Steve) dislikes over-engineering and accumulated dead code. Wants clean minimal sync — Dolt push/pull replaces JSONL intermediary. Hates --force workarounds — fix root causes. Gets frustrated when agents dont understand the projects own conventions.
